name: Standard Monitoring Cycle
description: The default UC8 Section 6.2 dataset. 7 counterparties, 8 trades across T+1 and T+2 windows. Covers all three intervention types: LOLR (CP-001), settlement roll (CP-002/CP-003), and regulatory escalation (CP-005 watchlist). Validates the full 7-step pipeline end-to-end.

assertions: CP-002 (28% lending gap, recent failure) → HIGH, SETTLEMENT_ROLL
